contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 75
- Description: Butterfly Effect credentialing — operator-ready + template repo + cleanup
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1056
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/181
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/lineage-credentials/pull/14
  
  Details:
  Third stretch of today (180 + 120 = 300 prior min logged). Took the end-to-end working system into operator-ready state: deployed sentiment_importer via ./deploy.sh on seni_ror_new + seni_sk_new so Edgar auto-fires the central handler on attestation events (PR #1056 deployed; manual Process pending events button no longer required). Created TrueSightDAO/program-template public repo as the canonical fork target for new cohort-credentialing programs, sanitized from butterfly-effect-club with all ERA-specific values replaced by TODO placeholders. Added scripts/create_roster_sheet.py to program-template — bootstraps the Cohort Roster Google Sheet from SCHEMA with both tabs, all 16+9 columns, formatting (frozen header, banding, conditional format on status), and sharing (tokenomics SA + admin emails as editors) in one command. OAuth-based so future LLM agents helping set up new programs can run it directly. agentic_ai_context PR #181 updates CREDENTIALING_COHORT_PROGRAM_ONBOARDING §5.2 to point at the new template repo. lineage-credentials PR #14 fixes the build-cv-cache push race (5-retry-with-rebase loop closes the window concurrency:group alone does not fully cover). Cleaned up 3 duplicate pk-* directories from lineage-credentials (artifacts from pre-4acddd5 multi-click race) and triggered cache rebuild. Admin panel UX improvements: in-place row update on Attest instead of full table re-render (no scroll jump), inline Retry button on failure instead of alert popup. Verified live: Ayesha Tabassum + Falak Naz + Horab Jamil + Kainat Rehan + Rameesa Naseer ud Din credentials all live at truesight.me/programs/butterfly-effect/credentials/.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 125.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
